notes: The engineering layer is additive. The verse is named as a denial of agent/patient attribution to the embodied; the engineering analog is named as a register translation of that denial in deprecation contexts. Sanskrit is quoted as structural marker, not as proof of a hidden technical claim. The disagreements field surfaces the Advaita/Vishishtadvaita scope question. The literal_meaning preserves the verse's actual force. No claim that the Gita 'really' teaches deprecation policy. PASS.
